poi.radius.label: Search radius
poi.categories.label: Categories
poi.attribution: OpenStreetMap data queried through Overpass API. Keep radiuses and filters small to respect the public service.
poi.idle: Choose a radius and categories, then press Search.
poi.empty: No nearby places were found for that radius and category combination.
poi.tooMany: The result limit was reached. Reduce the radius or keep fewer categories active.
poi.error.generic: Nearby places could not be loaded right now.
poi.error.timeout: The request took too long. Try a smaller radius or fewer categories.
poi.error.rateLimited: Overpass is temporarily rate-limiting requests. Wait a moment and try again.
poi.addPlanSuccess: A new plan was created from this place.
poi.addPlanError: This place could not be converted into a plan.
poi.map.label: Nearby places map
poi.plan.title: Nearby places of interest
poi.plan.description: Search restaurants, culture, transport and other useful spots around the current plan location.
poi.plan.noLocationTitle: This plan does not have coordinates yet
poi.plan.noLocationDescription: Add a valid location to the plan to search nearby places with OpenStreetMap.
plan.location.selectionRequired: Select a search result or pin the point on the map to save its coordinates.
plan.location.invalidCoordinates: The selected location does not have valid coordinates. Search again or pin the point on the map.
tripPois.metaDescription: Save trip points of interest with an icon and location so they appear on maps.
tripPois.title: Points of interest
tripPois.description: Save important trip places by searching the map, pinning them manually or using your current location.
tripPois.explorerDescription: Results are calculated around the current trip accommodation and synced with the map.
tripPois.noAccommodationTitle: This trip does not have accommodation coordinates yet
tripPois.noAccommodationDescription: Configure accommodation with a valid location to search nearby places from this view.
tripPois.empty: You have not saved any points of interest for this trip yet.
tripPois.form.name: Point name
tripPois.form.locationHelper: Search a place, choose a result, pin the point on the map or use your current location.
tripPois.form.helper: Create a point with name, icon and location to show it on the trip maps.
tripPois.form.error: The point of interest could not be saved.
tripPois.form.locationRequired: Add a name and valid location before saving.
